name: Tandoori Roasted Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine saffron and lemon juice; let stand about 5 minutes.
2. Drain chicken, reserving lemon juice. Set aside saffron threads and lemon juice.
3. Discard giblets and neck of the chicken. Rinse under cold water and pat dry.
4. Place chicken, breast side up, in a shallow baking dish coated with cooking spray.
5. Cut 2 (1/2 inch deep and 1 inch long) slits in each chicken thigh and breast.
6. Pour reserved lemon juice into slits. Cover and marinate in the refrigerator for 30 minutes.
7. Combine reserved saffron, coriander seeds, gingerroot, cumin, garlic, and half a cup of yogurt in a food processor.
8. Process until smooth. Transfer mixture to a bowl.
9. Add remaining yogurt and crushed chile, stirring well.
10. Spread yogurt mixture over chicken; cover and marinate in the refrigerator for 1 hour.
11. Remove chicken from marinade, reserving the marinade.
12. Place chicken, breast side up, in a shallow roasting pan; spoon reserved marinade over chicken.
13. Bake at 400°F for 15 minutes. Reduce heat to 350°F and bake an additional 1 to 1 1/2 hours, or until drumsticks are easy to move and juices run clear. Let stand 5 minutes.
(Fat 7.7. Chol. 83)
